title: Beef & Blade
description: Weapon-dependent drop rates for leather and beef
body:
[🌏Visit my website](https://khazoda.com)

# 🥩 Beef & Blade ⚔️ **Beef & Blade can be used serverside only, and will work with vanilla clients. Please report any problems/bugs to the issue tracker.** Since version 1.1.0, Beef & Blade is available as a datapack (or datapack wrapped as a mod) ## What this datapack does Leather is used in a huge number vanilla and modded recipes, yet is hard to reliably get early-game. **Beef & Blade** rebalances cow drops by letting the player pick what resources they need from a cow by using different weapons. Drop values can be fully customized in the mod's config file. --- ### Vanilla Default Drops ### Beef & Blade Defaults --- With Beef & Blade installed, you can still obtain cow's default drops by killing them with any other weapon/tool/method that isn't direct attacks with a sword or axe.
